Satu m governs the two signs of the Zodioc i.e. Capricorn and
Aquarius. the 10'11 and 11"' houses of the natural Zodiac. He is exalted
in Ubra; debilitated in Aries and detrimented in Cancer and Leo.
Saturn rules elders, debts and repayment. wills and estates. jails.
prisons. exile. shoes. stone. legal matters. tladitions. the sense of duty,
printing, fertilizers. servants. time, limitations, justice, just rewards; old
age. old things and the past. Saturn is karaka (Significator) of the 6th,
81 h, 1oth and 12° houses. Stupidity. dullness, want of originality, dearth
of ideas. laziness, idly wasting time are the outcome of ill-posited Saturn.
Saturn denotes all matters kept hidden or in secret. excavation of tunnels,
under-ground trenches and burial ground. Saturn aspects the 3r0, 7th
and 101t1 houses fmm its position. His favourite stone is blue sapphire,

and his mental is steel. Ourir')Q transit.
